summary: Trait Graph Service (MOJO Bible Part 1 §13) - All 26/26 backend tests PASSED. The Trait Graph intelligence layer is fully functional: GET trait-graph stats returns metrics, POST service-outcome updates MOJO traits and adds timeline events, POST behaviour-observation updates traits from provider feedback. Life timeline endpoint works without datetime errors.
critical_code_review_comments: trait_graph_service.py is well-structured with clear SOURCE_PRIORITY constants (direct_input:100, soul_form:95, service_outcome:90, purchase:85, behaviour:75)
SERVICE_TO_MOJO_MAPPINGS cover all 10 service types (grooming, bath, nail_trim, vet_visit, vaccination, checkup, boarding, daycare, training, dog_walking)
Each service type correctly maps to timeline_category (care, health, service, milestone)
Integration with concierge_routes.py (line 1762-1784) properly calls on_service_completed() when tickets are resolved
Integration with checkout_routes.py (line 581-594) properly calls on_order_placed() when purchases complete
seed_data_creation: Test service outcomes added timeline events for Lola
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trait Graph Service is fully functional. The trait-graph stats for pet-e6348b13c975 shows: 27 traits tracked, 92% avg confidence, 81 total evidence, 19 high-confidence traits (>80%). Sources breakdown: service_outcome(14), behaviour_observation(8), direct(4), mira(1). All 10 service types map correctly to timeline categories. Integration with concierge_routes (ticket resolution) and checkout_routes (purchase) are both implemented.

GET /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/trait.response: Returns total_traits, by_source, avg_confidence, total_evidence, high_confidence_traits

GET /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/life-.response: Returns timeline with service events, no datetime errors
GET /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/life-.events_shown: 10 events including grooming, vet_visit, training, etc.
